rationale: The cited paper is a close conceptual precursor: it studies self-control after goal violation/failure and shows how an added resource (available credit) changes persistence-related behavior, which aligns with the citing paper’s stated positioning against prior work that flexibility/resources can undermine outcomes. Given this plausible theory/mechanism linkage (and an exact DOI match to the JMR 2011 article), this does not look like a clearly incidental mention.
